-   More
    
    [Documentation](https://github.com/postmanlabs/postman-mcp-server)[Privacy Policy](https://privacy.postman.com/policies/)[Support](https://github.com/postmanlabs/postman-app-support/issues)
    

With Postman's MCP server, you can prompt AI to automate work across your Postman collections, environments, workspaces, and more.

You can use Postman to:

**Test APIs by running collections:**  
"Run the authentication test collection against our staging environment"

**Generate idiomatic client code from APIs:**  
"Generate Python client code for the user management API endpoints"

**Keep Postman collections and workspaces in sync with your code:**  
"Update the payment API collection to match the latest OpenAPI spec"
